title: Fake Snake, ‘Blessed’ Seeds, Tiger Skin: Inside ‘Godman’ Ashok Kharat’s Rs 100-to-1 Lakh Con As 150 Foreign Trips Raise Red Flags
description: Viral South Korea vacation photos of arrested self-styled godman Ashok Kharat expose stark contrast between his spiritual image and lavish lifestyle. The probe widens into alleged extortion, sexual exploitation and ‘aghori’ rituals.
